description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a complex, multi-wing layout and a mix of hip and gable roof sections. The exterior is primarily light-colored, with large windows and several distinct rooflines, including a prominent dark gray roof over the main living area. The house features a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool and a broad patio area, ideal for outdoor gatherings. The front includes a circular driveway, landscaped with a small tree and bordered by a low fence, leading to a main entrance with a covered porch. Multiple balconies and terraces are visible, suggesting luxurious living spaces and ample natural light. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, with an emphasis on open, airy spaces and outdoor amenities.
description: A large, modern suburban house with a complex roofline, spacious backyard pool, and a circular driveway leading to a covered entryway. The design features multiple balconies, large windows, and a mix of contemporary and traditional elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, landscaped entry, and main entrance with a covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard swimming pool, patio area, and rear-facing windows and terraces.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the expansive pool, patio, and multiple large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the garage, driveway, and additional landscaping details.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and multiple balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, circular driveway, and landscaped approach with a prominent front door.
